name: Skull Stompers
short_description: Have you noticed how everyone acts like whoever is most offended, wins? Society bends over backward for fragile feelings—but not here. Introducing the most offensive game ever—where nobody cares about your feelings. Shove ‘em up your ASS!
detailed_description:
The most offensive game ever, take your feelings and SHOVE THEM UP YOUR ASS!

Play as a parody of Trump and the other 15 playable Skull Stomper characters! Which some are unlocked by beating levels.
Each playable character has unique stats!!
Game has over 1,000 one liners when you stomp skulls.
7 unique worlds!
2 BOSSES!  And another Boss in Devils DoorStep.
A SpeedRunners dream!
Race against Eagle to beat your previous best times!
Approximately 3 hours of gameplay!

The 16 playable parodies are the biggest highlight. '

See the first picture to see the roster of characters you can play as!

Man this game must be a million dollars?!
WAIT -- WHAT DO YOU MEAN IT'S FREE?!
